title: 2024 Matric Success Celebration
excerpt: Paballelo High School celebrated an impressive 88.7% matric pass rate, marking one of the schools strongest academic performances in recent years.
excerptXh: Isikolo Samabanga Aphakamileyo sasePaballelo sibhiyozele izinga eliphezulu lokupasa le-88.7% kumatriki, okubonisa enye yezindlela ezinhle zezemfundo zesikolo iminyaka edlule.
excerptAf: Paballelo Hoerskool het 'n indrukwekkende 88.7% matriek slaagsyfer gevier, wat een van die skool se sterkste akademiese prestasies in onlangse jare merk.
excerptTn: Sekolo se Segolo sa Paballelo se keteka sekgala se se godimo sa go pasa sa 88.7% mo matriking, se se bontshang nngwe ya ditiro tsa thuto tse di godimo tsa sekolo dingwaga tse di fetileng.
content: Paballelo High School celebrated an impressive 88.7% matric pass rate, marking one of the schools strongest academic performances in recent years. The achievement ceremony was attended by the Department of Education officials, school governing body members, and proud parents. Our learners have shown exceptional dedication and hard work throughout the year.
contentXh: Isikolo Samabanga Aphakamileyo sasePaballelo sibhiyozele izinga eliphezulu lokupasa le-88.7% kumatriki, okubonisa enye yezindlela ezinhle zezemfundo zesikolo iminyaka edlule. Umcimbi wempumelelo waqhelwa abasebenzi beMnyango Wezemfundo, abasebenzi bomgca wesikolo, namazali angaphandle. Abafundi bethu ba khombise ukuzithemba okuphezulu kanye nomsebenzi omnzi kunyaka wonke.
contentAf: Paballelo Hoerskool het 'n indrukwekkende 88.7% matriek slaagsyfer gevier, wat een van die skool se sterkste akademiese prestasies in onlangse jare merk. Die prestasie-seremonie is bygewoon deur departement van onderwys amptenare, skool beheerliggaam lede, en trotse ouers. Ons leerders het uitsonderlike toewyding en harde werk gedurende die jaar getoon.
contentTn: Sekolo se Segolo sa Paballelo se keteka sekgala se se godimo sa go pasa sa 88.7% mo matriking, se se bontshang nngwe ya ditiro tsa thuto tse di godimo tsa sekolo dingwaga tse di fetileng. Pheletso ya katlego e ne ya etelwa ke bagodi ba Tirelo ya Thuto, batshwarelo ba baetapele ba sekolo, le batsadi ba ba ratang. Baithuti ba rona ba bontshitse tiro e e tlhokomelang thata le moseka wa tiro mo ngwageng otlhe.

title: Inter-School Sports Tournament
excerpt: Learners represented the school proudly in soccer, netball, athletics, and volleyball competitions across the ZF Mgcawu district.
excerptXh: Abafundi basebenzise isikolo ngokuziphatha kakuhle kwebhola, unetibholi, ukugijima, kanye novolibholo emgcweni weZFMgcawu.
excerptAf: Leerders het die skool trots verteenwoordig in sokker, netbal, atletiek, en vlugbal kompetisies oor die ZF Mgcawu distrik.
excerptTn: Baithuti ba berekisetse sekolo ka katlego ka bolo ya dinao, netball, tsamaiso, le volleyball dikopanong tsa kwa ntle ga ZF Mgcawu.
content: Learners represented the school proudly in soccer, netball, athletics, and volleyball competitions across the ZF Mgcawu district. Our teams brought home several trophies and medals, showcasing the talent and dedication of our athletes. The sports department continues to excel in developing well-rounded learners.
contentXh: Abafundi basebenzise isikolo ngokuziphatha kakuhle kwebhola, unetibholi, ukugijima, kanye novolibholo emgcweni weZFMgcawu. Amatimba ethu abeke ekhaya izicoco namadala, ekhombisa ubume bokukhuthaza kwabadlali bezemidlalo. Umnyango wezemidlalo uqhubeke nokuphumelela ekukhuliseni abafundi abapheleleyo.
contentAf: Leerders het die skool trots verteenwoordig in sokker, netbal, atletiek, en vlugbal kompetisies oor die ZF Mgcawu distrik. Ons spanne het verskeie trofeë en medaljes tuis gebring, wat die talent en toewyding van ons atlete toon. Die sportdepartement bly uitblink in die ontwikkeling van afgeronde leerders.
contentTn: Baithuti ba berekisetse sekolo ka katlego ka bolo ya dinao, netball, tsamaiso, le volleyball dikopanong tsa kwa ntle ga ZF Mgcawu. Dikglopa tsa rona di boetse ditrophies le medale, di bontsha kgatlhego le tiro e e tlhokomelang ya baithuti ba rona. Lefapha la metshameko le tswelela ka go tlhoka go tshwara ditiro mo go tlhabololang baithuti ba ba feletseng.

title: Heritage & Culture Day
excerpt: The school hosted a vibrant cultural celebration showcasing traditional dance, poetry, music, and local heritage.
excerptXh: Isikolo siphethe umbhiyozo wenkcubeko oqinisekayo okhombisa indlavu yesintu, iimbongo, umculo, nenkcubeko yasekuhlaleni.
excerptAf: Die skool het 'n lewendige kulturele viering gehuisves wat tradisionele dans, poësie, musiek, en plaaslike erfenis vertoon.
excerptTn: Sekolo se tshwaretse letsatsi la setso le le tlhoka go bontsha motantsho wa setso, thothokiso, mmino, le boswa jwa kwa ntle.
content: The school hosted a vibrant cultural celebration showcasing traditional dance, poetry, music, and local heritage. Learners dressed in traditional attire and performed various cultural items. The event was a celebration of our diverse South African heritage and promoted cultural understanding among learners.
contentXh: Isikolo siphethe umbhiyozo wenkcubeko oqinisekayo okhombisa indlavu yesintu, iimbongo, umculo, nenkcubeko yasekuhlaleni. Abafundi abeqhubeke ngamava esintu kwaye benza izinto zangaphakathi zenkcubeko. Lo mcimbi waba yumbhiyozo wenkcubeko ethi xaqhutywayo yaseMzantsi Afrika waza wakhuthaza ukuqonda wenkcubeko phakathi kwabafundi.
contentAf: Die skool het 'n lewendige kulturele viering gehuisves wat tradisionele dans, poësie, musiek, en plaaslike erfenis vertoon. Leerders het in tradisionele klere geklee en verskeie kulturele items uitgevoer. Die geleentheid was 'n viering van ons diverse Suid-Afrikaanse erfenis en het kulturele begrip onder leerders bevorder.
contentTn: Sekolo se tshwaretse letsatsi la setso le le tlhoka go bontsha motantsho wa setso, thothokiso, mmino, le boswa jwa kwa ntle. Baithuti ba apere diaparo tsa setso le ba dira ditiro tsa setso tse di farologaneng. Letsatsi le ne le le letsatsi la boswa jwa rona jaaka Aforika Borwa le le rotloetsa go kwala setso phakathi ya baithuti.
